name: General Contracting
title: AI Tools for General Contractors | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for general contractors — qualify leads, draft estimates, and keep clients updated on every project. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Remodels and builds run for weeks, and the admin runs constant — qualifying leads, building estimates, and keeping clients in the loop. We build the tools that carry that weight.
drains: Tire-kicker leads mixed in with serious project inquiries
Detailed estimates and proposals eating the owner's nights
Clients asking for status updates the office struggles to keep up with
The owner pulled between the field, the bids, and the phone

tools.title: Lead-qualifying assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply and the right questions — scope, budget range, timeline — so serious projects get a consult booked and tire-kickers get filtered before they eat your week.

tools.title: Estimate & proposal drafter
tools.body: From your scope notes, it drafts a clean estimate and a professional proposal — line items, phases, your standard terms. Hours of evening admin become a short review.

tools.title: Client update assistant
tools.body: It sends clients a clear, regular project update — what's done, what's next, what needs a decision — so the office isn't fielding 'where are we?' calls all day.

tools.title: Morning project brief
tools.body: One text each morning: active jobsites, crew and sub assignments, inspections and deliveries due, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.before: Serious leads and tire-kickers got the same attention; the owner's time leaked into bad-fit consults.
cases.after: An assistant qualifies every lead on scope, budget, and timeline before a consult is booked.
cases.impact: Representative result: the owner's consult time spent almost entirely on real projects.

cases.context: A general contractor whose clients felt out of the loop.
cases.before: Update calls and emails piled up; clients chased the office for status.
cases.after: Clients get a clear, regular project update automatically.
cases.impact: Representative result: fewer status calls and a noticeably better client experience.

faq.a: Yes. It asks about scope, budget range, and timeline up front. Serious projects get a consult booked; weak-fit inquiries get a polite response without burning your calendar.
It drafts the estimate and a professional proposal from your scope notes — line items, phases, your terms. You review and finalize.

faq.q: Will it work with my project software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Buildertrend, CoConstruct, or whatever you use to run projects.
